allow: Bash(echo "=== Parent \(D:/\) top level ===" && ls -la "D:/" 2>/dev/null | head -50 *)

Bash(echo "=== folder names containing azmir/noor/glow anywhere on D: ===" && find "D:/" -type d \\\( -iname "*azmir*" -o -iname "*noor*" -o -iname "*glow*" \\\) 2>/dev/null | grep -vi node_modules | head -20 *)
